title: Circle3D Object
description: Transient 3D circle. A transient circle is not displayed or saved in a document. Transient 3D circles are used as a wrapper to work with raw 3D circle information. They are created statically using one of the create methods of the Circle3D class.

methods.name: classType
methods.description: Static function that all classes support that returns the type of the class as a string. The returned string matches the string returned by the objectType property. For example if you have a reference to an object and you want to check if it's a SketchLine you can use myObject.objectType == fusion.SketchLine.classType().

methods.name: copy
methods.description: Creates and returns an independent copy of this Circle3D object.

methods.name: createByCenter
methods.description: Creates a transient 3D circle object by specifying a center and radius.

methods.name: createByThreePoints
methods.description: Creates a transient 3D circle through three points.

methods.name: getData
methods.description: Gets all of the data defining the circle.

methods.name: set
methods.description: Sets all of the data defining the circle.

properties.name: asNurbsCurve
properties.description: Returns a NURBS curve that is geometrically identical to the circle.

properties.name: center
properties.description: Gets and sets the center position of the circle.

properties.name: curveType
properties.description: Returns the type of geometry this curve represents.

properties.name: evaluator
properties.description: Returns an evaluator object that lets you perform additional evaluations on the curve.

properties.name: isValid
properties.description: Indicates if this object is still valid, i.e. hasn't been deleted or some other action done to invalidate the reference.

properties.name: normal
properties.description: Gets and sets the normal of the circle.

properties.name: objectType
properties.description: This property is supported by all objects in the API and returns a string that contains the full name (namespace::objecttype) describing the type of the object.   It's often useful to use this in combination with the classType method to see if an object is a certain type. For example: if obj.objectType == adsk.core.Point3D.classType():

properties.name: radius
properties.description: Gets and sets the radius of the circle.

related_samples.name: Get Circle and Arc Data from Edge API Sample
related_samples.description: Display the arc and circle geometric information from a selected circular edge.

classType.title: Circle3D.classType Method
classType.description: Static function that all classes support that returns the type of the class as a string. The returned string matches the string returned by the objectType property. For example if you have a reference to an object and you want to check if it's a SketchLine you can use myObject.objectType == fusion.SketchLine.classType().
classType.return_description: Returns a string indicating the type of the object.

copy.title: Circle3D.copy Method
copy.description: Creates and returns an independent copy of this Circle3D object.
copy.return_description: Returns an independent copy of this Circle3D object.

createByCenter.title: Circle3D.createByCenter Method
createByCenter.description: Creates a transient 3D circle object by specifying a center and radius.
createByCenter.return_description: Returns the new Circle3D object or null if the creation failed.

parameters.name: center
parameters.description: The center point of the circle.

parameters.name: normal
parameters.description: The normal vector of the circle. The plane through the center point and perpendicular to the normal vector defines the plane of the circle.

createByThreePoints.title: Circle3D.createByThreePoints Method
createByThreePoints.description: Creates a transient 3D circle through three points.
createByThreePoints.return_description: Returns the new Circle3D object or null if the creation failed.

parameters.name: pointOne
parameters.description: The first point on the circle.

parameters.name: pointTwo
parameters.description: The second point on the circle. This point cannot be coincident with pointOne or pointThree. This point cannot lie on the line defined by pointOne and pointThree.

parameters.name: pointThree
parameters.description: The third point on the circle. This point cannot be coincident with pointOne or pointThree.

getData.title: Circle3D.getData Method
getData.description: Gets all of the data defining the circle.

parameters.name: center
parameters.description: The output center point of the circle.

parameters.name: radius
parameters.description: The output radius of the circle.

related_samples.name: Get Circle and Arc Data from Edge API Sample
related_samples.description: Display the arc and circle geometric information from a selected circular edge.

set.title: Circle3D.set Method
set.description: Sets all of the data defining the circle.

parameters.name: center
parameters.description: The center point of the circle.

parameters.name: normal
parameters.description: The normal vector of the circle. The plane through the center point and perpendicular to the normal vector defines the plane of the circle.

transformBy.title: Circle3D.transformBy Method
transformBy.return_description: Return true if the transform was successful.

parameters.name: matrix
parameters.description: A 3D matrix that defines the transform to apply to the curve.
